name: openved
description: OpenVED — 2D vector editor. Native third-party dependencies for the Windows build.
$comment: Qt is intentionally NOT listed here. Building Qt from vcpkg takes 1-2h; instead Qt comes from a normal Qt installation (pass -QtDir to build-windows.ps1, or install-qt-action in CI). vcpkg only provides freetype + harfbuzz, which CMake picks up via find_package(... CONFIG) → Freetype::Freetype / harfbuzz::harfbuzz.
